name: babel-o
description: Nexus-first rewrite of BabeL-X with a lightweight interactive CLI.

scripts.test: BABEL_O_CONFIG_FILE=/tmp/babel-o-test-config.json tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/adapters.test.ts test/agent-loop.test.ts test/classifier.test.ts test/compact-summary.test.ts test/completer.test.ts test/context-assembler.test.ts test/context-regression.test.ts test/diff.test.ts test/logger.test.ts test/mcp.test.ts test/message-normalizer.test.ts test/optimizer-safety.test.ts test/permission-flow.test.ts test/provider-recovery.test.ts test/providers.test.ts test/retry.test.ts test/run-session-flow.test.ts test/runtime-llm.test.ts test/runtime.test.ts test/security.test.ts test/skills.test.ts test/snip-compactor.test.ts test/system-prompt-builder.test.ts test/token-estimator.test.ts test/tool-prompt.test.ts test/tool-trace.test.ts test/tui-renderer.test.ts test/tui-input.test.ts test/worktree.test.ts test/optimize-command.test.ts test/editor.test.ts
